catalyst_name.Description & StandardDefinition: The systematic or common nameof the catalyst complex.

catalyst_ccdc_number.Description & StandardDefinition: The Cambridge CrystallographicData Centre reference number.

2d_structure.Description & StandardDefinition: The 2D structure of the catalyst in ChemDraw/ image/chemicalSMILE form.

catalyst_metal.Description & StandardDefinition: The metal center of the catalyst.

catalyst_metal_oxidation_state.Description & StandardDefinition: The formal oxidation state of themetal center which is basicallythe formal charge the metal ionwould have if all the ligandswere removed along with theelectrons they donate.

catalyst_reference.Description & StandardDefinition: The bibliographic reference for the catalyst and its synthesis.

reaction_type.Description & StandardDefinition: The type of polymerizationreaction (classification of polymerization by the type ofreaction or product).

cocatalyst.Description & StandardDefinition: The compound used to activatethe catalyst.

cocatalyst_ratio.Description & StandardDefinition: The molar ratio of Cocatalyst toMetal.

comonomer_1_name.Description & StandardDefinition: The name of the first comonomer(if any).

comonomer_1_conC.Description & StandardDefinition: The concentration of the firstcomonomer in mol/L.

comonomer_2_name.Description & StandardDefinition: The name of the secondcomonomer (if any).

comonomer_2_conC.Description & StandardDefinition: The concentration of the secondcomonomer in mol/L.

comonomer_3_name.Description & StandardDefinition: The name of the thirdcomonomer (if any).

comonomer_3_conC.Description & StandardDefinition: The concentration of the thirdcomonomer in mol/L.

monomer_Sequence_in_dimers_or_trimers.Description & StandardDefinition: The monomer sequence indimers/trimers simply refers to the specific arrangement of monomer units (A, B,..) in the short chain, which could behomosequence (AAA),alternating (ABA), ormixed/random (AAB, BBA,etc.), depending on the chemistry(if Any).

activity.Description & StandardDefinition: Catalytic activity, typically in kg_polymer /(mol_metal * h).

comonomer_1_incorp.Description & StandardDefinition: Mol% incorporation of the firstcomonomer in the polymer chain.

comonomer_2_incorp.Description & StandardDefinition: Mol% incorporation of the second comonomer in thepolymer chain.

comonomer_3_incorp.Description & StandardDefinition: Mol% incorporation of thethirdcomonomer in the polymerchain.

tensile_strength_mpa.Description & StandardDefinition: Tensile strength at break in MPa.
